description: plan-it pipeline statechart — the explicit model the SKILL.md prose explains. Deterministic core: states, gates, and guards live here; the fuzzy work (research, synthesis, authoring) is LLM-at-the-node inside each state. Paste this file into https://stately.ai/viz to see the pipeline.

artifactsOnDisk.rule: Rule 3 — idle ≠ delivered. Every fan-out output must exist on disk and be non-empty before the pipeline advances.

contractFrozen.rule: Rule 1 — no frozen CONTRACT → no parallel squads. Structural check: version header, sections, changelog, no placeholders.

handoffLintClean.rule: Pre-handoff consistency gate (playbooks §F, mechanizable half): counts, IDs, Test Contract presence, token lint.

gateRecorded.rule: Rule 2 — human gates are recorded with owner + date in the state file before the pipeline advances.

meta.title: Intake
meta.does: Capture the raw vision, pointers, and use-case. Initialize .plan-it/state.json.

meta.title: DoD lock
meta.does: Restructure the demand into a numbered, individually-verifiable Definition of Done + assumptions.

meta.title: Scope & shape governor
meta.does: Pick size (S/M/L) + packaging shape; present with the DoD; the human approves. Record owner + date.

meta.title: Pre-ground
meta.does: Locate exact targets (paths, sessions, live-system observations) so fan-outs never work blind. Live-grounding gate for running systems.

meta.title: Discovery
meta.does: Fuzzy work: research fan-out per the chosen discovery mode. Each agent stages findings to disk.

meta.title: Preflight (env facts)
meta.does: Probe the real environment before synthesis locks anything in: emit ENV-FACTS.md (S-shape 6-probe minimal set; M/L full 9-probe set). Probes record PRESENT/ABSENT/TIMEOUT with evidence — never guessed.

meta.title: Synthesis + memory
meta.does: Fuzzy work: merge team reports into the findings doc; adversarial reconciliation; capture project memory.

meta.title: Spec authoring
meta.does: Fuzzy work: author design docs in dependency order. Model the confusing parts: every multi-step / approval-gated / agentic / concurrent workflow gets an explicit model.

meta.title: Decision round
meta.does: Batch every human-only decision into one numbered round, each with a recommendation. Lock answers with owner + date.

meta.title: Coherence pass
meta.does: Thread new concepts from G2 through the docs; grep for now-stale terms the decisions invalidated; fix them.

meta.title: Delivery gate
meta.does: Ask: specs aligned — proceed to the delivery package? Record owner + date.

meta.title: Backbone freeze
meta.does: Write CONTRACT.md (frozen v1.0), program plan, STATUS board — squads build against these.

meta.title: Parallel planning
meta.does: Fuzzy work: squad fan-out writes PRDs + epics (each ending in its Test Contract) against the frozen CONTRACT. Cross-cutting findings fold back as amendments.

meta.title: Verify
meta.does: Enforce the Test Contract gate + run the pre-handoff consistency lint; fix and re-lint until clean.

meta.title: Handoff
meta.does: Assemble README/KICKOFF, fill the board, produce the launch prompt for the build agent (/fable-it).

meta.title: Package delivered
meta.does: The delivery package is complete; the build runs in a fresh session.
